hunger_games_01_scene01.title: The Hunger Games — Chapter 1 / Scene 1
hunger_games_01_scene01.text: When I wake up, the other side of the bed is cold.
quizlet: rough canvas cover of the mattress
still worn but not so beaten-down
всё ещё измождённая, но не сломленная
eyes the color of rotting squash
ещё один рот, которого нужно кормить
he has stopped hissing at me
the closest we will ever come to love
самое близкое к любви, что у нас будет
supple leather that has molded to my feet
мягкая кожа, принявшая форму моих ног

questions.question: What does “rough canvas cover” suggest?
questions.explanation: It suggests a poor, uncomfortable, practical environment.

questions.question: What does “cocooned in my mother’s body” suggest?
questions.explanation: “Cocooned” creates an image of being wrapped, protected, and safe.

questions.question: Which phrase shows innocence and freshness?
questions.explanation: “As fresh as a raindrop” is a soft image of innocence and purity.

questions.question: What does “another mouth to feed” mean?
options: another person or animal to provide food for
questions.explanation: It means another dependent who needs food and resources.

questions.question: What does “silent as a stone” emphasize?
questions.explanation: The simile emphasizes that there is no sound at all.

hunger_games_01_scene02.title: The Hunger Games — Scene 2
quizlet: turn a blind eye to something
the odds are in your favour
be scared out of your wits
you could hear a pin drop
трудно не злиться / не испытывать горечь
keep on good terms with someone
turn up one's nose at something

questions.question: What does “cocooned” suggest?
questions.explanation: “Cocooned” suggests being wrapped, protected, and enclosed.

questions.question: What does “crawling with fleas” mean?
questions.explanation: “Crawling with” means full of something unpleasant.

questions.question: Which phrase describes physical damage from hard work?
questions.explanation: “Swollen knuckles” points to physical labour and hardship.

quizlet: The blood drained from her face
ни с того ни с сего
take over as head of the family

quizlet: It didn't occur to me that...
мне не пришло в голову, что...
a bell went off in my head
turn a blind eye to something
